body:

The President is working around-the-clock to enact the agenda YOU voted for.

**Now, our critically important end-of-quarter deadline is only 3 days away, and President Trump has asked me to reach out to top supporters like you.**

Democrats are against our progress at every turn, and it's going to take every resource we have to keep fighting for our AMERICA FIRST agenda.Since we have to report our fundraising publicly, a group of generous donors has agreed to step up and **DOUBLE-MATCH ALL DONATIONS THROUGH MIDNIGHT SATURDAY.**

name: Mark Warner
subject: Tim needs us
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Kaine for Virginia
body:
---

Derek,

I've known Tim Kaine for more than 30 years. Since the moment we met in law school, he's been almost singularly focused on improving people's lives through public service, first as a civil rights lawyer, then as mayor of Richmond. And I couldn't have asked for a better Lieutenant Governor during my term as Governor, or teammate in the U.S. Senate.

Together, we've worked to beat back attacks on our nation's health care system, fought for fair funding for education, and defended important programs like Social Security and Medicare. We need Tim in the Senate so he and I can keep fighting for all Virginians.

**But to get there, Tim 's going to need your help. Can you pitch in to help Tim's team hit their $70,000 end-of-quarter goal?**

| _If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately:_
---
**[Express donate $10>>](http://salsa3.salsalabs.com/dia/track.jsp?v=2&c=RrzN%2BnCjmpHJzmLuqYPLTpQwT5FQbftU)**
**[Express donate $25>>](http://salsa3.salsalabs.com/dia/track.jsp?v=2&c=eAeoPdqC2136JfFR4bIqDfl%2FbqMIk0xz)**
**[Express donate $50>>](http://salsa3.salsalabs.com/dia/track.jsp?v=2&c=EuqVydblCYoPUI2f6TiDRpQwT5FQbftU)**
**[Express donate $100>>](http://salsa3.salsalabs.com/dia/track.jsp?v=2&c=5ztQn8nivXielD%2FPVwhSLJQwT5FQbftU)**
**[Or, donate a different amount>>](http://salsa3.salsalabs.com/dia/track.jsp?v=2&c=UvVnhZO3K8NROwlTqU7YxpQwT5FQbftU)**

This campaign is going to be hard. Tim's first opponent is already promising to run a "vicious, ruthless" campaign against him. He's going to spend as much time and money as he can between now and Election Day to try to drag this race into the mud and misrepresent Tim's strong record. And outside groups are going to do the same.

That's why every fundraising deadline is important from here on out. Tim needs to have the resources to defend himself from attacks and talk about the good work he's doing for all Virginians.

**[Will you chip in now to make sure Tim meets that $70,000 goal before the end-of-quarter deadline?](http://salsa3.salsalabs.com/dia/track.jsp?v=2&c=nnrpAJZpC0gSkP0Jry7Gy5QwT5FQbftU)**

Thank you,

Senator Mark Warner

[**DONATE**](http://salsa3.salsalabs.com/dia/track.jsp?v=2&c=7KQTER%2B9G54aKHk3cuglV5QwT5FQbftU)
---
| | Paid for by Kaine for Virginia
---

If you no longer wish to receive updates from our campaign, please [unsubscribe](http://salsa3.salsalabs.com/dia/track.jsp?v=2&c=nK059s7clqJOjO9Ca5m5uZQwT5FQbftU).

name: Jill Vogel
subject: Do you like our first TV ad?
disclaimer_text: Paid for and Authorized by Vogel for Virginia45 North Hill Drive, Suite 100Warrenton, VA 20186

| Dear Peter,
Election day is less than six weeks away and our campaign is ready to win.
This is going to be our year.
The polls have us in a statistical dead heat and enthusiasm for our ticket is high following Ed Gillespie's big win at the second debate. We are showing how smart policy reforms will make Virginia the best state to live, work, and raise a family.
Today we are [launching our first TV ad of the general election](http://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001Lfaq07UqFioVqJVpIvHuvWAxq8brtIgSr1E-9c-XUm4euhKI9NT1aeeytarC3DdyuD8hmfiqianvsP-32KosJQsB-OCOX0PKyl1Waoi1m3Vrar3Qv95ohwKkm9ZSnbxkhQbWOfIx6FyxD9F_GJAMhcOt0RC0q4LA1kUnyW0h9NXVOhrO8-bgadChxg-WD7dPuMEYMS6G8_dt8exOUEGfGQd3U95Dxp6y6xmZEPMqByQ=&c=VNNOnpw_U4_wL0rTvS8LYrqGaryTl9a7SAAOLAOT5aSujyxTpEu73A==&ch=fjrRPu9hEscDRS87ja7oRxuCdtkccPNz757cAGfIvVawDmOz5UTdRQ==) and I wanted our best supporters to have a chance to watch it before it hits the airwaves.
[We need to get our positive message out and your contribution of $1000, $500, $100, or even $50 will go a long way to buying TV time and stopping our opponent from bringing his far-left Bernie Sanders agenda to Virginia.](http://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001Lfaq07UqFioVqJVpIvHuvWAxq8brtIgSr1E-9c-XUm4euhKI9NT1aY7rP4e4jFyHn38WPlvqBp1IN8HOWtzWj2XXcgaNKFSYa4okg0Wa-LuMFQdMJlsILzGcuRLKYKJKcUn_PTOXPPKHA_6CpypUOC0H7wK7UIPgjRVVUVvwZfo=&c=VNNOnpw_U4_wL0rTvS8LYrqGaryTl9a7SAAOLAOT5aSujyxTpEu73A==&ch=fjrRPu9hEscDRS87ja7oRxuCdtkccPNz757cAGfIvVawDmOz5UTdRQ==)

| The big issues of our time are not partisan issues.
I have loved my time in public service because it has given me an opportunity to be a champion for important issues, like protecting women from domestic violence and human trafficking.
I worked hard to ban child marriage in Virginia, and took on the insurance companies to fight for coverage for children with autism - every single year until it passed.
As your Lieutenant Governor, I will always put principles over politics.
Virginians are ready for real, transformative leadership focused on getting results and making Virginia the best state to live, work, and raise a family, and that starts by electing people who are independent-minded and who will put principle over party to do what is right for Virginia.

name: The White House
subject: President Trump Receives a Briefing on Hurricane Maria
body:
1600 Daily
https://click.mail.whitehouse.gov/?qs=87e6fa8d8922a76587bb2ee278a9972136dd6e7b01c43e77b947ef052c17fe0b26c521e5a691120934bb358af3ec3d25aa5393256a376055

Hurricane Maria
Yesterday, President Donald J. Trump received two briefings on hurricane recovery efforts in Puerto Rico and announced an
https://click.mail.whitehouse.gov/?qs=87e6fa8d8922a76516653877861dc6dbbd6a51f76981f0767825471b62d0a339709b12e18883e6fd691cf356f4eb193155c67f58af766c6e
amendment to the Puerto Rico and
https://click.mail.whitehouse.gov/?qs=87e6fa8d8922a765de3fc2fd59d91b9242eb6181222c5c2dd37cb5a65a45e89c832ecfba4c7e1c040520bb526f02dcc159a2b590a29b562a
U.S. Virgin Islands disaster declarations. These amendments will provide additional disaster assistance by authorizing additional federal funding for debris removal and emergency protective measures over the next 180 days.

“Over the last several weeks our Nation has been tested by the destructive force of Mother Nature,” the President said in yesterday’s press conference, “but we will respond to it with an even mightier force: the resolve of the American spirit.”
Those who have been affected can apply for assistance through FEMA
https://click.mail.whitehouse.gov/?qs=87e6fa8d8922a7654b1567621d73ebf4454f9d21bb239d0f849f7c84817a2d92bf54c811b1f99084a472fe8b7dadd9ea206bc4533d732393
here.

The President of Spain Visits the White House

President Trump welcomed President Mariano Rajoy Brey of Spain to the White House yesterday. Both leaders spoke about their strong relationship and their views on foreign policy issues. President Brey highlighted Spain’s current economic recovery and his country’s commitment to fighting terrorism. In a joint White House press conference held in the Rose Garden, President Trump called on the European Union and other nations to unanimously condemn the Maduro regime and impose sanctions on Venezuela.

https://click.mail.whitehouse.gov/?qs=87e6fa8d8922a76571e782e150b35359315e3f04347aa142f92952e2319b569aceefc2420b5cf081973569b0997287d7824a5fdd8b2cb573
Read more

Access to High-Quality Coding and Computer Science Education

Senior Advisor to the President Ivanka Trump arrived at Detroit Design 139 in Detroit, Michigan on Tuesday to participate in an event highlighting a public and private-sector commitment promoting access to high-quality coding and computer science education programs in K-12 schools. “Computer science and coding are priorities for the administration as we think about pathways to jobs and alignment of education to in demand jobs in the modern economy,” she said.

Photo of the Day

President Donald J. Trump receives a briefing on Hurricane Maria relief and recovery efforts | September 26 (Official White House Photo by Joyce N. Boghosian)

POTUS and VP TODAY

Today, President Trump will be traveling to Indiana to deliver remarks on the need for tax relief for the American economy.
https://click.mail.whitehouse.gov/?qs=87e6fa8d8922a765bef230ddc8b3f05decbf3090e5c7272da8621fa62e6ff214d59c25233da8f321f237f51eec6148fc01b751ac083ff9ee
Watch live at 3PM EST. Vice President Pence will participate in tax reform meetings with conservative leaders.

Coming Up

On Thursday, the Vice President will be in Wisconsin and Michigan to meet with business leaders and families to discuss the need for tax reform.

https://click.mail.whitehouse.gov/?qs=87e6fa8d8922a765c32b69f680e78c86b16106c6a417d97a2dd34cfb08ae954d1b137e049e99ec4ab600654284e23973667806df7dab3b9d
Privacy Policy |

name: Jay Inslee
subject: For us to lead
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Jay Inslee for Washington
body:
There is no time to wait in fighting climate change.

| [](http://links.e.jayinslee.com/ctt?kn=3&ms=MTIwMTMzMDQS1&r=MTM2NjM5NDY2ODI1S0&b=0&j=MTI0MjMwMDkzNwS2&mt=1&rt=0) Friend, It is time for us to lead. For our people at home, yes, but also for everyone else. For Houston. For Florida. For Puerto Rico. For Southeast Asia. For our Earth. President Trump won't fight climate change. He won't take care of our home. He won't take care of our people. And he is not taking care of the planet. President Trump and his administration will always put big oil, dirty coal, and their personal interests ahead of us and a sustainable future for our kids. As leaders, we have a responsibility to protect the world's citizens from disasters like the ones that have ravaged our communities this past month. With sea levels on the rise and more carbon in our atmosphere, scientists tell us extreme weather patterns will only get worse. So, with President Trump refusing to take action to combat climate change, we must step up. We must fight climate change. Right here. Right now. Globally and locally. That's why I need you to stand with me today and help my campaign raise $10,000 before our official end-of-month deadline at **mid night on September 30th**. We're building a movement to make sure we are prepared for the task ahead -- people from every corner of the country ready to take climate action. [**Climate change can 't wait -- if you agree, donate $5 to invest in our fight for our Earth.**](http://links.e.jayinslee.com/ctt?kn=2&ms=MTIwMTMzMDQS1&r=MTM2NjM5NDY2ODI1S0&b=0&j=MTI0MjMwMDkzNwS2&mt=1&rt=0) It's up to us to do the long, hard work of combating global climate change. I'm ready to go. I'm ready to do whatever it takes. Are you? Very truly yours, Jay Inslee | [CONTRIBUTE »](http://links.e.jayinslee.com/ctt?kn=4&ms=MTIwMTMzMDQS1&r=MTM2NjM5NDY2ODI1S0&b=0&j=MTI0MjMwMDkzNwS2&mt=1&rt=0)

We elect pro-choice Democratic women who will fight for women and families. | [ ](https://secure.emilyslist.org/page/m/118c614d/24c69fd9/95e6ebb6/189df2f1/679659917/VEsH/ "https://secure.emilyslist.org/page/contribute/donate-to-emily?utm_medium=email&utm_source=emilyslist&utm_content=1+-+%0D%0A++++++++++++++++++++++++++++++++&utm_campaign=WQEFE951N_digital_email_20170927_EOQSupporterRecord_inact&source=WQEFE951N_digital_email_20170927_EOQSupporterRecord_inact")
---

Peter,

As a candidate, I was so grateful every time the EMILY's List community showed up to have my back.

Now, as the executive director of EMILY's List, I get to tell candidates that help is on the way -- that no matter the challenge, we'll be there. And our women definitely need to know we are with them right now.

The end of our third quarter is just days away, and this is a critical time for our women to get their campaigns off the ground.

So I've gone through our records to see what everyone in our community is doing to help, and here's what I have on file for your email address:
**EMILY's List Donation History**
**Donor for 2017 3rd Quarter:** Not Active
**[Suggested Action: Donate $3 to show you're committed to electing pro-choice Democratic women.](https://secure.emilyslist.org/page/m/118c614d/24c69fd9/95e6ebb6/189df2f2/679659917/VEsE/ "https://secure.emilyslist.org/page/contribute/20170925_email_SeptEOQ-ns?utm_medium=email&utm_source=emilyslist&utm_content=2+-+Suggested+Action+if+consinConsGroup11313&utm_campaign=WQEFE951N_digital_email_20170927_EOQSupporterRecord_inact&source=WQEFE951N_digital_email_20170927_EOQSupporterRecord_inact")**
I know what this community can do when we work together, and there is nothing like it. It is incredible.

We now have more than 18,000 women who want to run for office and dozens more across the country who need our help to win re-election. Our list of endorsed candidates just keeps growing!

Supporting all of these women is going to take everyone doing their part.

**Donate $3 before September is over to help elect pro-choice Democratic women in races up and down the ballot:**

**[https://secure.emilyslist.org/Reach-Our-EOQ-Goal](https://secure.emilyslist.org/page/m/118c614d/24c69fd9/95e6ebb6/189df2f3/679659917/VEsF/ "https://secure.emilyslist.org/page/contribute/20170925_email_SeptEOQ-ns?utm_medium=email&utm_source=emilyslist&utm_content=3+-+httpssecureemilyslistorgReachOurEOQGoal&utm_campaign=WQEFE951N_digital_email_20170927_EOQSupporterRecord_inact&source=WQEFE951N_digital_email_20170927_EOQSupporterRecord_inact")**

Thank you, and go team!

Emily Cain
Executive Director, EMILY's List

name: Democrats.org
subject: re: Alabama and Virginia
body:
Step up before Saturday's deadline.
---
**Pitch in $3 or whatever you can before Saturday's end-of-quarter deadline to help Democrats win in every state.

** **[DONATE](http://my.democrats.org/page/m/40523466/4067b0a/399c06271/7e62748c/3768068019/VEsH/ "https://my.democrats.org/September-Deadline-AB?utm_medium=email&utm_source=dnc&utm_content=1+-+DONATE&utm_campaign=em_20170927_ems_nd&source=em_20170927_ems_nd&refcode=em_20170927_ems_nd")**

This end-of-quarter deadline is not my first time at the rodeo, Derek.

For over a decade, I've worked with Democratic candidates up and down the ballot, helping them fight back against the GOP's ever-growing war chest.

These deadlines are moments when the pressure is highest -- campaigns are doing everything possible to secure the resources it takes to hire enough organizers and make their case directly to voters.

**[September's deadline is no different.](http://my.democrats.org/page/m/40523466/4067b0a/399c06271/7e62748d/3768068019/VEsE/ "https://my.democrats.org/September-Deadline-AB?utm_medium=email&utm_source=dnc&utm_content=2+-+Septembers+deadline+is+no+different&utm_campaign=em_20170927_ems_nd&source=em_20170927_ems_nd&refcode=em_20170927_ems_nd")** Democrats have candidates running in states like Alabama and Virginia this fall, and we're ramping up our plans to reclaim control of Congress next year so we can put Donald Trump in check.

Moments like this make or break elections, Derek. So, pitch in $3 or whatever you can to help Democrats win -- there's too much on the line to sit this one out.

**If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately.

name: Elizabeth Warren
subject: We don't have time to point fingers
disclaimer_text: Paid for by the DSCC, dscc
body:
I'm in this fight for hard working people. And to stay in this fight, Senate Democrats and I need your support to stay in the Senate.
---
**[](http://action.dscc. "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/dscc-ewarren?refcode=DPE-20170927-Warren-ProsHV&recurring=auto&firstname=&lastname=&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&addr1= &city=&state=&zip=&phone=&employer=&occupation=&amounts=5,10,25,50,100,150,250&amount=5")**
Team,

Hard-working people were already hanging on by their fingernails long before Donald Trump got elected last November. But this week makes it crystal clear: Donald Trump and the Republicans are all in to help out giant corporations, and that means delivering one blow after another to working people -- and for some, it's now the knockout blow.

I'll be blunt: We don't have time to point fingers about what happened last November. We can't waste energy trying to decide which member of our alliance to vote off the island.

America's working families are under attack right now. The way I see it: We can fight against each other, or we can fight for the people who need us. Me? I'm in this fight for hard working people.

But in order for us to stay in this fight, Senate Democrats and I need to stay in the United States Senate. The Republican machine is already pulling out its 2016 playbook against us -- trying to keep us distracted from their dangerous agenda. They are running ads in my race and against other Senate Democrats now.

[**The DSCC is closing in on a critical end-of-quarter deadline on Saturday. Will you chip in $1 today to help Senate Democrats hit our goal before midnight on Saturday?**](http://action.dscc. "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/dscc-ewarren?refcode=DPE-20170927-Warren-ProsHV&recurring=auto&firstname=&lastname=&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&addr1= &city=&state=&zip=&phone=&employer=&occupation=&amounts=5,10,25,50,100,150,250&amount=5")

In all these fights, for all these years, you've always been by my side -- fighting along with me to stand up to the billionaires, giant corporations, and their buddies in Washington.

This was never about me -- it was about all of us working together to level the playing field. Now the stakes have never been higher and Senate Democrats and I are counting on your support.

Thanks for being a part of this,

Elizabeth

**Democratic Senatorial Campaign Committee
120 Maryland Ave. NE
Washington, DC 20002** Paid for by the DSCC, dscc.org,
and not authorized by any candidate or candidate's committee.
The DSCC is the only committee solely dedicated to supporting Democrats in the U.S. Senate. This message was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com because you are a part of the DSCC's grassroots network. Please add us to your address book or approved senders list to make sure you keep receiving DSCC updates. Emails are a critical way for us to stay in touch with our grassroots supporters. 99% of the DSCC's contributions come from grassroots donors giving less than $200. We also strive to keep you updated on issues related to the Democratic Party's values.

If you'd like to take a break from DSCC emails, [click here](http://action.dscc.org/page/m/3954df8f/2b07114c/1711c17d/7315bb27/4110831967/VEsF/p/eyJKU1ZGVFVGSlRDVWwiOiJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSJ9/ "https://secure.dscc.org/page/s/take-an-email-break?email=dpwillis67@gmail.com").

If you'd like to make a contribution to support us, please [click here](http://action.dscc.org/page/m/3954df8f/2b07114c/1711c17d/7315bb26/4110831967/VEsC/ "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/supportdscc?refcode=DPE-disclaimer"). Together, we're going to take back the Senate, but we'll need the help of every single grassroots supporter to do it. If you'd like to stop receiving all emails from the DSCC, please [click here](http://action.dscc.org/page/m/3954df8f/2b07114c/1711c17d/7315bb21/4110831967/VEsD/p/eyJKU1ZGVFVGSlRDVWwiOiJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSJ9/ "https://secure.dscc.org/page/content/unsubscribe?email=dpwillis67@gmail.com"). We greatly appreciate your continued support. Contributions or gifts to the DSCC are not tax deductible.

body:

than show we’re standing together.

It will also have a direct impact on our ability to stand up for
democratic legitimacy as soon as October.

Once October arrives, the Supreme Court will start hearing a case that
could decide the constitutionality of partisan gerrymandering. We’ll

name: Andrew Gillum
subject: Last night's victory in Florida
body:
#
Team --
Last night, South Florida voters chose Annette Taddeo to represent them in the State Senate. This special election victory for a Democrat shocked politicos and pundits alike across the state.
Let me tell you a secret, though -- she won because she ran this campaign on her progressive principles, stuck to her values, and led a massive grassroots field program to contact voters. She won without help from corrupt special interests and instead relied on small dollar contributions from activists and advocates like you -- even as the Republicans outspent her.
This is the key to victory in Florida, and I believe it is the only path forward. What we saw last night was nothing short of incredible -- and if enough of us are willing to come together, we can see it again and again in every Florida election from here on out.
[**Will you join us in keeping up the momentum after this tremendous victory by chipping in to our campaign to turn Florida blue today >>**](http://act.andrewgillum.com/page/m/fcb328a/9e00690/4f603a43/24036b22/2962968990/VEsH/ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/ag-sept2017?refcode=em170927-atg")
This is proof that the concept of abandoning our values and selling out on our principles is both ineffective and unnecessary. Annette showed our state last night that it is absolutely possible to run as a progressive in Florida and win without giving up what you truly believe in.
[**That 's how we're running this campaign too, and I hope you'll join us in making our next progressive victory possible.**](http://act.andrewgillum.com/page/m/fcb328a/9e00690/4f603a43/24036b22/2962968990/VEsE/ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/ag-sept2017?refcode=em170927-atg")
Congratulations to Senator Elect Annette Taddeo. I can't wait to see what you accomplish for South Florida, and I look forward to working with you as our next Governor.
Bring it home,
Andrew
**[CONTRIBUTE](http://act.andrewgillum.com/page/m/fcb328a/9e00690/4f603a43/24036b22/2962968990/VEsF/ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/ag-sept2017?refcode=em170927-atg")**

Paid by Andrew Gillum, Democrat, for Governor

This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is one of the most important tools we have to reach supporters like you, but you can let us know if you'd like to [receive fewer emails](http://act.andrewgillum.com/page/m/fcb328a/9e00690/4f603a43/24036b25/2962968990/VEsC/p/eyJKU1ZGVFVGSlRDVWwiOiJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSIsIkpTVmFTVkFsSlE9PSI6IiJ9/ "http://act.andrewgillum.com/page/s/receive-fewer-emails?source=email_footer&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip="). We'd hate to see you go, but if you need to do so, click here to [unsubscribe](http://act.andrewgillum.com/page/m/fcb328a/9e00690/4f603a43/24036b24/2962968990/VEsD/ "https://gillum.cp.bsd.net/page/unsubscribe/").
